description:
Overview:

UPGRADED LED LIGHT - No matter whether it is sunny or rainy outside, the adjustable LED lights can evenly illuminate your face. Don't worry about the lack of light, illuminate your beauty. Light is natural and soft, bright and not dazzling, which can protect your eyes.

SMART MAKEUP CASE - this makeup mirror with storage lights has an adjustable brightness mode. There is a touch switch on the surface of the mirror, short press the touch sensor to turn on the light, and long-press the switch to adjust the brightness of the light. Adjust freely according to your needs, convenient and fast.

COMES WITH STORAGE FUNCTION - This is a 2-in-1 makeup mirror with lights and storage. In addition to the adjustable brightness, the bottom of the mirror is the storage box. After finishing makeup, you can directly insert lipsticks into the small storage box to save space for your dressing table. If go out or have a trip, you can fold the mirror into the suitcase.

ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT - The angle of this non-removable stand can be adjusted, you can change the horizontal or vertical placement direction according to your needs. The material is ABS, which is firm and hard to break. Long service life, lighted makeup mirror with light and storage worth every penny.


Product information:
Color: Cherry blossom powder, warm white, green grass green
Number of layers: 1 layer
Function: multi-purpose, portable, dustproof, moisture-proof
Material: Plastic
Type: storage box


Packing list:
Storage box X1
